chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1179 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (priority) 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of CMA No.4897/2023 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 12.03.2024 Syed Jaffar Ali Shah, Advocate for petitioners. Mr. Shahryar Imdad Awan, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Mr. Manzoor Hussain N. Larik, Advocate has filed power on behalf of respondents No.2 to 4. Learned AAG Sindh has filed power on behalf of respondents No.5 and 9. Learned Counsel for the petitioners submits that he would be satisfied and not press this petition, if respondent No.6 is directed to decide the application of the petitioners, available at page 33 of the file, against declaring respondents No.11 to 29 as returned candidates in Employees’ Union Election of Mehran University, Shaheed Zulfiqar Ali Bhutto Campus, Khairpur in 2023 after one of the candidate of the petitioners had withdrawn his nomination. Learned AAG Sindh records his no objection. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed as not pressed. Let respondent No.6 decide the application of the petitioners, if already pending, against the cause of action as above, after hearing both the parties within a period of two months. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
